title: jurinea delitescens
intro: Jurinea delitescens, also known as the Chinese button-flower or yellow thistle, is a perennial plant belonging to the Asteraceae family. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Jurinea delitescens are attributed to its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain and swelling, and improve respiratory health. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and decoctions to take advantage of its medicinal properties, and it is also sometimes used in combination with other herbs to enhance its effects.
